title: Tata Elxsi is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Elxsi is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
